response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals with 14+ years of experience and proven ability to master multiple languages and systems. However, his C++ expertise is dated (2014-2015, 11 years ago), with his recent decade focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and web development. The absence of industrial automation, IoT, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity background—core to this role—represents a significant domain gap. While his systems thinking, TDD discipline, and learning agility are assets, the immediate C++ proficiency and industrial domain knowledge required for a mid-senior C++ developer role are not present.
strengths: Deep software engineering fundamentals with proven track record mastering diverse languages (C++, DLang, Java, TypeScript) and architectural patterns
Demonstrated expertise in real-time systems, event-driven architectures, and high-performance computing (Dunnhumby's millions of requests/sec, low-latency apps, wave field synthesis)
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture—TDD practitioner, CI/CD advocate, active mentor and educator on coding standards
concerns: C++ experience is 11 years outdated (2014-2015 National Instruments role); recent career (past 10 years) focused on web/product engineering with JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.js
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IoT platforms, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA, MQTT)
Career trajectory prioritizes web/product systems over embedded systems or low-level systems programming required for this role

key_factors.factor: Software engineering fundamentals and learning agility
